seoTitle: Allow Videos to Autoplay in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to enable autoplay for videos in your Canva designs to boost engagement in presentations and social content.
intro: Autoplay videos can capture attention instantly, making them useful for presentations, promotional content, and social media. This guide covers how to enable autoplay for video elements inside Canva.

steps.heading: Navigate to the video settings
steps.body: Select the video element in your Canva design and open its settings panel.

steps.heading: Enabling autoplay feature
steps.body: Toggle the autoplay option so the video begins playing automatically when the design is viewed or presented.

steps.heading: Best practices for autoplay
steps.body: Keep autoplay videos short and relevant so they don't distract from your overall message.

steps.heading: Common pitfalls to watch for
steps.body: Be mindful of sound settings, since autoplaying video with audio can be jarring if not intended.

faq.question: Will autoplay work the same across all platforms?
faq.answer: Autoplay behavior can vary depending on where the design is shared, especially on platforms with their own autoplay restrictions.

faq.question: Can I disable autoplay after enabling it?
faq.answer: Yes, you can turn off autoplay at any time through the same video settings panel.

faq.question: Is autoplay useful for digital signage?
faq.answer: Yes, autoplay is especially useful for digital signage and presentations where hands-free playback is needed.

faq.question: Does autoplay affect video quality?
faq.answer: No, enabling autoplay only affects playback behavior, not the video's resolution or quality.
